notes: Post-Fed digestion ongoing after Warsh's hawkish debut spiked yields and pressured tech; VIX 18.4, day P&L -$8.6k. With a 2026 rate-hike risk live and inflation at a 3-year high, I'm holding defensive until the yield/tech selloff stabilizes.
journal_entry: Holding 0.35 risk-off into the close — tape still soft (day P&L -$8.6k, VIX 18.4) but slowly improving from -$15k earlier. Avoids unchanged: parabolic MTEN/GPUS (+40.9%), AMC dilution, CLOV insider sales, AAPL extended, BFLY TD Cowen event tomorrow (Jun 18), AMD/ROKU/CRVO weak momentum. Watching whether yields ease and tech finds a floor before re-risking; MU/MRVL holding green on the AMD-MEXT memory-shortage theme.
